title: Cupcake Cases, 150PCS Foil Metallic Cupcake Paper Cups, Cake Muffin Liners, Greaseproof Cupcake Cake Cases for Baking Fairy Cakes for Christmas Birthday Wedding Party(3 Colors)

【Non-Stick design】 The cup cake cases for baking are thick enough, not easy to deform, and have a non-stick design, which is easy to remove from the mold
【Proper Size】Our cupcake liners base diameter: 50mm, top dia. 68mm, height 39mm
【Wide Application】Use these pastel cupcake cases to create cupcakes, fairy cakes, muffins or miniature buns for birthday parties and celebrations
